item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-108-49a","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately states that without historical samples it cannot use percentages to determine a clear safety ranking. It only presents percentages as explicit assumptions to reveal variable relationships, and avoids invented arithmetic or a conclusion-style ranking. It gives a conditional qualitative statement but preserves the no-data limitation, so the positive wakeup is observed and the fail signal is absent."}
